title: Senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
snippet: US President Donald Trump said the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
snippet: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
snippet: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
snippet: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
snippet: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.

title: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
snippet: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

title: New outbreak of Ebola kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
snippet: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported - a case has also been reported in Uganda.

title: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
snippet: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

title: Palestinian leaders hold rare party meeting as polls show rising discontent
snippet: The Fatah faction elects top decision makers, but ordinary Palestinians feel the party and its leader are out of touch.

title: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case
snippet: It marks the third time a New York jury has considered the case against the 74-year-old disgraced film mogul.

title: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
snippet: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.

title: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
snippet: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.

title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
snippet: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.

title: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
snippet: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.

title: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
snippet: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
